jobs.prompt: Isolated on a pure plain solid white background, no text, no words, no background scene, centered, clean crisp edges. A glossy bright red 3D love heart with a jagged crack splitting the top, and a few small red and orange fragments bursting out of the crack (same shattered heart look). Crossed in a clean X behind and below the heart: a realistic black AR-15 rifle on one side and a realistic over-and-under wooden ball-trap clay-shooting shotgun on the other side. Bold clean sticker style, vibrant, precise, t-shirt and embroidery ready, no watermark.
